data.body: PASS 1 (G6 approach soundness) — Cluster 1: PASS, no findings. Verified against code: seam (_store/canonical.py) currently has positional canonical_str(event)/canonical_bytes(event); additive keyword-only ascii_only/default params preserve the six positional importers. All four migration sites confirmed byte-for-byte: signing._canonical_payload (ensure_ascii=False), schema.canonical_json (ensure_ascii=False), conflict_resolver._hash_value (omits ensure_ascii → stdlib default True, plus default=str — both load-bearing, plan's reasoning correct), mutation.serialize_manifest (ensure_ascii=True). Mechanism, fitness-for-purpose, approach selection, and positive rationale all hold.
